name: TV Azteca, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: TV Azteca, S.A.B. de C.V. engages in the production of Spanish-language television content worldwide. It operates four television networks in Mexico, which consist Azteca uno, Azteca 7, adn40, and a+ through approximately 300 owned and operated stations. The company produces various content, including series, reality shows, newscasts, sports broadcasts, music shows, game shows, talk shows, and variety shows. It also owns soccer team. The company was formerly known as Controladora Mexicana de Comunicaciones, S.A. de C.V. and changed its name to TV Azteca, S.A.B. de C.V. in 1996. TV Azteca, S.A.B. de C.V. was founded in 1993 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
